creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
Insert Olympus WS-400S DVR into extenal USB hub and "the system" goes bonkers trying to figure out what to
do with the "thing". Disabling HALD doesn't make any difference.

If the device is attached to the USB hub whilst in console mode and X/Gnome is subsequently started, X hangs
up indefinately (or at least, a very, very long time).

It can take up to 1-2 full minutes before "the system" stops trying to figure out the newly attached device
and I then can manully mount the device (which I prefer to do versus HALD).

The same activity occurs when attempting to unmout the device.

= = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = =
